description_long: This bungalow features a modern, open-plan layout with large windows and glass walls, allowing for abundant natural light. The structure is primarily white with flat roofs and includes a spacious outdoor patio area adorned with greenery and potted trees. The main living space is visible through expansive glass panels, and the interior showcases a mix of wood flooring and contemporary furnishings. A prominent glass extension, likely a sunroom or greenhouse, is attached to one side, while the opposite side features a more private, enclosed garden terrace. The front entrance is accessible via a paved walkway flanked by green lawn patches. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass walls, open-plan interiors, and landscaped outdoor areas. The design features clean lines, white facades, and a prominent glass extension.
description_view_0: The main facade with the entrance, paved walkway, and a view into the open living area and patio with greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the glass extension and the transition between the paved area and green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the enclosed garden terrace with potted trees and a more private section of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Back facade with symmetrical window arrangement and a clear view of the patio and main living space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and glass walls
